violations.text: The floors in the kitchen and bar area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Ceiling in the walk-in cooler observed with rust. Ceiling shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The floors in the kitchen and ware-washing area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
The floor tiles and grout in the bar area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
Ceiling in the walk-in cooler observed with rust. Ceiling shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, walk-in coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The floors in the kitchen and ware-washing area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

Dishes and utensils were observed in the kitchen hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Staff removed the utensils from the hand-washing sink during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

ROP mahi observed in reduced oxygen environment in the cold drawer. ROP mahi observed at 38 degrees F. Proper thawing of ROP seafood products reviewed. -Staff removed the mahi from reduced oxygen environment during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

Knife observed stored on an unclean surface between 2 prep tables in the kitchen. Staff removed the knife to wash, rinse, and sanitize during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
Ceiling in the walk-in cooler observed with rust. Ceiling shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The floors in the kitchen and ware-washing area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
